writers.composer: Laura Welsh/Jayson M. Dezuzio/Ruben C/Julia Den Boer/Teddy Geiger/Victor Pool

lyrics.text: Playing with temptation, searching for salvation
lyrics.translation: 沉溺于万般诱惑 苦苦寻觅救赎

lyrics.text: Can we find our way back, way back?
lyrics.translation: 我们还能否找到归去的路？

lyrics.text: Caught up in confusion, need a resolution
lyrics.translation: 困顿于疑惑之中 急需下定决心

lyrics.text: Can we find our way back, way back?
lyrics.translation: 我们还能否寻回美妙的过往？

lyrics.text: No more running, no more running, no more chasing
lyrics.translation: 别再逃跑 别再狂奔 别再追逐

lyrics.text: No more running, now I'm running out of patience
lyrics.translation: 别再逃跑了 我的耐心即将耗尽

lyrics.text: Caught up in confusion, need a resolution
lyrics.translation: 困顿于疑惑之中 急需下定决心

lyrics.text: Can we find our way back, way back?
lyrics.translation: 我们还能否找到归去的路？

lyrics.text: Can we find our way back, way back?
lyrics.translation: 我们还能否寻回美好的昨日？

lyrics.text: Can we find our way back, way back?
lyrics.translation: 我们还能否溯回那美好的过去？
